# Security Policy

## Reporting a Vulnerability

If you discover a security vulnerability in BizFlow NH, please report it responsibly.

**Do NOT create a public GitHub issue.**

Instead, email us at **security@bizcode.pl** with:
- Description of the vulnerability
- Steps to reproduce
- Potential impact

We will respond within 48 hours and work on a fix.

## Supported Versions

Only the latest version of BizFlow NH is supported. Always run `./ctl.sh update` to stay current.
